1.title: Never Outshine the Master
1.author: Robert Greene
1.meaning: Always make those above you feel superior. If you outshine your superior, they may become insecure and work against you.

2.title: Never Put Too Much Trust in Friends, Learn How to Use Enemies
2.author: Robert Greene
2.meaning: Friends can become jealous or betray you, while former enemies often prove more loyal when given a chance.

3.title: Conceal Your Intentions
3.author: Robert Greene
3.meaning: Keep your true plans hidden so others cannot predict, interfere with, or block your actions.

4.title: Always Say Less Than Necessary
4.author: Robert Greene
4.meaning: Speaking less makes you appear more confident and prevents others from gaining information they can use against you.
